books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A tale of wealth, obsession, and the American Dream set in the roaring 1920s, following the mysterious millionaire Jay Gatsby and his pursuit of the enchanting Daisy Buchanan.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A must-read handbook for software engineers that teaches practical techniques for writing readable, maintainable, and efficient code that stands the test of time.

books.title: A Brief History of Time
books.author: Stephen Hawking
books.description: An iconic exploration of the universe's biggest mysteries — from the Big Bang to black holes — written for general readers without any background in physics.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A philosophical novel following a young Andalusian shepherd on a magical journey to find a worldly treasure, discovering that true wealth lies in following one's personal legend.

books.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
books.author: Andrew Hunt
books.description: A timeless guide for developers offering practical advice on software craftsmanship, career building, and writing code that adapts to changing requirements and technologies.

books.title: Cosmos
books.author: Carl Sagan
books.description: A breathtaking journey through space and time, exploring the origins of the universe, the nature of life, and humanity's place among the billions of galaxies.

books.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
books.author: Harper Lee
books.description: A powerful story of racial injustice and childhood innocence set in the American South, seen through the eyes of young Scout Finch as her father defends a Black man.

books.title: You Don't Know JS
books.author: Kyle Simpson
books.description: A deep dive into the core mechanisms of JavaScript, challenging common misconceptions and revealing the true power of the language that runs the modern web.

books.title: The Selfish Gene
books.author: Richard Dawkins
books.description: A revolutionary examination of evolution from the gene's perspective, introducing the concept of the selfish gene and the cultural equivalent known as the meme.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A chilling dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society under constant surveillance, following Winston Smith as he dares to question the all-powerful Party and its leader Big Brother.

books.title: JavaScript: The Good Parts
books.author: Douglas Crockford
books.description: A concise guide that uncovers the elegant and reliable subset of JavaScript, helping developers avoid the language's pitfalls and write better, more maintainable web applications.

books.title: The Gene: An Intimate History
books.author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
books.description: A sweeping narrative of the history of the gene, from Mendel's peas to CRISPR, exploring how this fundamental unit of heredity shapes identity, disease, and the future of humanity.

books_data.title: The Future of AI
books_data.author: Dr. Elena Sterling
books_data.description: An in-depth exploration of artificial intelligence and its impact on the future of humanity.

books_data.title: Design Systems
books_data.author: Marcus Thorne
books_data.description: A comprehensive guide to building scalable and consistent design systems for digital products.

books_data.title: Modern Philosophy
books_data.author: Soren Vance
books_data.description: A journey through contemporary philosophical thought and its relevance in the modern world.

books_data.title: Digital Security
books_data.author: Sarah Chen
books_data.description: Essential practices for maintaining high security and technical precision in a digital world.

books_data.title: Data Science Mastery
books_data.author: Julian Black
books_data.description: A professional guide to data analysis, visualization, and analytical depth.

books_data.title: Urban Spaces
books_data.author: Liam Foster
books_data.description: Understanding modern architecture and the design of geometric urban facades.

books_data.title: The Cosmos Explained
books_data.author: Astra Nova
books_data.description: An awe-inspiring journey through the scale and mysteries of the universe.

books_data.title: New Economics
books_data.author: Robert Sterling
books_data.description: A minimalist approach to understanding the financial intelligence and the future of economics.

books_data.title: Creative Leadership
books_data.author: Emma Wright
books_data.description: Balancing creativity and structure in modern management and leadership.

books_data.title: Human Genetics
books_data.author: Dr. David Miller
books_data.description: A scientific exploration of the DNA helix and advanced genetic technologies.

books_data.title: World History
books_data.author: Professor Alan Watts
books_data.description: Blending traditional scholarship with modern presentation in a global historical context.

books_data.title: Advanced Computing
books_data.author: Kevin Patterson
books_data.description: A look at incredible precision hardware and the engineering behind modern hardware.
